title: Banking and insurance for your budget
intro: Understanding accounts, transfers, and mandatory health insurance early helps you plan deposits, rent, and day-to-day costs.

items.reason: Fast onboarding in English when you need a local IBAN for rent and salary.
Move money into euros and hold multiple currencies during the transition.
Compare insurers and premiums so insurance isn’t a surprise line item.
